# Security Policy

## 🚨 Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not open a public
issue**.

Instead, report it responsibly by:

-   Sending an email with detailed information about the vulnerability
-   Including steps to reproduce (if applicable)
-   Providing logs or screenshots if relevant

Contact email: robertsanseries@gmail.com

You can expect a response within a reasonable time frame.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔒 Responsible Disclosure

Please:

-   Allow time for the issue to be investigated and fixed before public
    disclosure.
-   Avoid sharing exploit details publicly until a fix has been
    released.

We appreciate responsible security research and will give proper credit
when appropriate.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for helping keep Ciano safe and secure ❤️
